data.name: Title
data.value: Keep your identity surface healthy at a glance.

data.name: Lead
data.value: Monitor users, internal clients, and scope coverage from one place before drilling into the management screens.

data.name: TotalUsersLead
data.value: Accounts currently managed by the IDP.

data.name: AdminCoverageLead
data.value: {0} of {1} users currently hold admin access.

data.name: TotalClientsLead
data.value: Internal applications and service clients registered in OIDC.

data.name: ConfiguredScopesLead
data.value: {0} permission mappings currently define access scopes.

data.name: ClientMixLead
data.value: Balance login-based apps, service clients, and mapped permissions without leaving the homepage.

data.name: ManageUsersLead
data.value: Review accounts, role assignments, and current admin coverage.

data.name: ManageClientsLead
data.value: Inspect client types, redirect URIs, scopes, and secrets.

data.name: RegisterClientLead
data.value: Create a new internal Web / SPA or Service / Daemon client.

data.name: GuidanceOne
data.value: Use Web / SPA for user sign-in flows with authorization_code, refresh_token, and PKCE.

data.name: GuidanceTwo
data.value: Use Service / Daemon for machine-to-machine workloads with client_credentials and a client secret.

data.name: GuidanceThree
data.value: Scopes and redirect URIs are the two most important fields to validate before releasing an integration.

data.name: AccessLimitedTitle
data.value: Dashboard data isn't available for this session.

data.name: AccessLimitedLead
data.value: Sign in with an admin-capable account to view the identity dashboard summary.
